steps: Go to https://console.neon.tech and create an account (or log in)
Click your account name or avatar in the top-right corner
Click 'API Keys' in the left sidebar
Enter a descriptive name for the key
Click 'Create' and immediately copy the displayed key — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Neon API key for managing projects, branches, databases, and compute endpoints

notes: The API key is shown only once — copy it immediately after creation
Free tier available with 1 project and limited compute hours
The key is sent in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <your_key>'
API keys are account-scoped and grant access to all your Neon projects
Neon uses serverless Postgres with automatic scaling and branching
